name: Universal Store Holdings Limited
analysis: UNI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$7.0500, stop A$5.9994, target A$7.7900 (0.70:1) — then trail it.
